records.question: Which obj_classes have the exact obj_class value ripples?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT obj_classes.obj_class_id FROM obj_classes
WHERE obj_classes.obj_class = 'ripples'
records.pred_sql: SELECT OBJ_CLASS_ID FROM OBJ_CLASSES WHERE OBJ_CLASS = 'ripples'
